file_insights.purpose: Build progress tracking and workflow documentation
key_content: Workflow type: simple (single-service, one adapter file)
7 subtasks in Phase 1 with sequential execution
External dependencies: QEMU (verified), zam (not yet built)
Graceful failure pattern for missing zam image

file_insights.purpose: Structured implementation plan with verification strategy
key_content: Adapter signature: def main [workdir, prompt_file, stdout_log, stderr_log, _memory_out?, --test]
VM execution via 9P filesystem mounting and UART serial output
Pattern files referenced: adapters/claude.nu, adapters/mock.nu, adapters/timeout_wrapper.nu

patterns_discovered.description: Nushell adapters follow 5-arg signature with optional --test flag for self-testing
Adapter exits 1 with clear error message when zam image unavailable, not blocking entire workflow
Three-tier exit codes: 0=success, 75=transient/retry, 1+=failure, enables dispatcher retry logic
9P mount for card bundle access, UART serial for output, VM isolated execution model
Verification strategy defined before implementation: unit tests, smoke tests, integration, make check

gotchas_discovered.context: External dependency not yet built at /Users/studio/zam/target/zam.elf
gotchas_discovered.impact: Adapter must fail gracefully until zam Wave 1 completes
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Adapter checks for image existence, exits 1 with clear message instead of crashing

gotchas_discovered.impact: Path assumption may not work on Linux or other systems
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Adapter should verify path or use $PATH lookup, not hardcode

gotchas_discovered.context: Adapters must run with --no-config-file flag to avoid shell config pollution
gotchas_discovered.impact: Adapter invocation requires special handling in dispatcher
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Already documented in dispatcher code and adapter test harness

gotchas_discovered.context: QEMU process may leave artifacts or lock files
gotchas_discovered.impact: Repeated adapter invocations could fail if cleanup incomplete
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Plan includes timeout handling and process termination in timeout_wrapper pattern

results: Prerequisites check passed - ready for adapter creation
Comprehensive implementation plan created with 6 remaining subtasks
Clear verification strategy defined for all phases
deliverables: implementation_plan.json with detailed subtask specs and acceptance criteria
Identified external dependencies and graceful failure model
next_steps: Subtask 1-2: Create adapters/qemu.nu with VM execution logic
Subtask 1-4: Smoke test graceful failure scenario

recommendations.recommendation: Strictly follow existing adapter patterns in adapters/claude.nu and adapters/mock.nu for consistency with dispatcher expectations
recommendations.rationale: Adapter signature and exit codes are contracts with dispatcher; deviation breaks reliability

recommendations.recommendation: Implement early path validation for zam image with descriptive error messages to stderr, not stdout
recommendations.rationale: Prevents VM launch attempts and enables clear user-facing errors when dependencies unavailable

recommendations.recommendation: Implement both internal unit tests (--test flag) and external smoke test (with temp card dir) before merging
recommendations.rationale: Unit tests verify logic, smoke test validates dispatcher integration and graceful failure paths

recommendations.recommendation: Create adapters/README.md documenting VM architecture, 9P mounting, UART serial output, and zam/dub dependencies before Phase 2
recommendations.rationale: Future maintainers and zam team need clear understanding of VM execution model and adapter contract

recommendations.recommendation: Add conditional logic to check /Users/studio/zam/target/zam.elf existence and provide clear instructions on building zam
recommendations.rationale: Enables smooth developer experience when zam becomes available, with clear build instructions

recommendations.recommendation: Ensure make check (cargo test + clippy + fmt) passes before marking Phase 1 complete
recommendations.rationale: Prevents regressions and maintains code quality standards for entire workspace
